Personal Income Tax Rebate

YA 2025

For YA 2025, a Personal Income Tax Rebate of 60% of tax payable, up to maximum of $200 was granted to tax resident individuals.

YA 2024

For YA 2024, a Personal Income Tax Rebate of 50% of tax payable, up to maximum of $200 was granted to tax resident individuals.

Non-resident tax rates

TypeFrom YA 2017 to YA 2023From YA 2024 onwards
Director fees22%24%
